abilities.description: When you make a move relying on someone else's honor or in your ideal of righteousness, add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit as conviction and trust light the path before you.

Once per fight, when you are in a bad spot, you may envision how your vows give you strength in this moment and risk it all. If you do, you are now in control. When you make your next move in this encounter, you may reroll one challenge die. On a miss, you must suffer a dire outcome.

When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.985a5415860a99e9]{Fulfill Your Vow} and score a miss, you may reroll one challenge die. If you score a miss again, reduce your maximum spirit by 1. You may recover this lost spirit when you next @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.985a5415860a99e9]{Fulfill Your Vow} and score a strong hit.
